user.title: SolArk Cloud — System Configuration
user.description: Enter your SolarkCloud credentials and system specifications. These are used to set gauge thresholds on the dashboard.

data_description.username: The email address you use to log in to solarkcloud.com.
data_description.password: The password for your SolArk Cloud account.
data_description.plant_id: Your plant ID, found in the SolArk Cloud URL after logging in (e.g. solarkcloud.com/plant/detail/123456).
data_description.inverter_rating: Rated output of a single inverter in watts (e.g. 12000 for a Sol-Ark 12K).
data_description.inverter_count: How many inverters are installed in parallel at your site.
data_description.panel_count: Total number of solar panels connected to the system.
data_description.panel_watts: Rated wattage of each individual solar panel (e.g. 400).
data_description.max_pv_power: Maximum combined output of the entire PV array in watts. Leave at 0 to auto-calculate from panel count and watts per panel.
data_description.battery_count: Number of battery units installed in the system.
data_description.battery_kwh: Usable energy capacity of each battery in kWh (e.g. 18.5 for a Fortress eVault MAX).
data_description.battery_max_power: Maximum charge or discharge rate per battery in watts (e.g. 8640 for a Fortress eVault MAX).
data_description.scan_interval_seconds: How often to poll the SolArk Cloud API for new data, in seconds. Default is 60.
data_description.timezone: IANA timezone for energy calculations (e.g. America/Detroit). Leave blank to use your Home Assistant timezone.
data_description.import_history: When enabled, historical energy data will be imported during initial setup. This may take several minutes.

reconfigure.title: SolArk Cloud — Reconfigure
reconfigure.description: Update your system specifications and polling settings. Credentials and plant ID cannot be changed here.

data_description.scan_interval_seconds: How often to poll the SolArk Cloud API for new data, in seconds. Default is 60.
data_description.timezone: IANA timezone for energy calculations (e.g. America/Detroit). Leave blank to use your Home Assistant timezone.
data_description.inverter_rating: Rated output of a single inverter in watts (e.g. 12000 for a Sol-Ark 12K).
data_description.inverter_count: How many inverters are installed in parallel at your site.
data_description.panel_count: Total number of solar panels connected to the system.
data_description.panel_watts: Rated wattage of each individual solar panel (e.g. 400).
data_description.max_pv_power: Maximum combined output of the entire PV array in watts. Leave at 0 to auto-calculate from panel count and watts per panel.
data_description.battery_count: Number of battery units installed in the system.
data_description.battery_kwh: Usable energy capacity of each battery in kWh (e.g. 18.5 for a Fortress eVault MAX).
data_description.battery_max_power: Maximum charge or discharge rate per battery in watts (e.g. 8640 for a Fortress eVault MAX).

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please verify your email and password are correct for solarkcloud.com.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the SolArk Cloud API. Check your network connection and try again.

abort.already_configured: This plant is already configured. Use the reconfigure option to update settings.
